summary: A battle is unfolding between Elric Merbinger and various opponents, including a powerful entity known as 'The Great One'. The outcome of the fight depends on Elric's ability to absorb their seals, but Grigori's bishop intervenes, citing his vessel status and Azazel's power. As the fight intensifies, it becomes clear that time is limited, with each side trying to gain an advantage.
key_moments: Elric Merbinger reveals his powerful abilities
Grigori's bishop intervenes on behalf of The Great One
The battle reaches a critical point as time runs out
